function.name: update
function.description:
Update existing file by replacing old_string with new_string. Auto-reads file if not already read.

- Use this to modify existing files only
- Will error if file doesn't exist (use 'write' tool instead)
- Automatically reads file if not already read in this conversation
- Requires exact unique string match for safe replacement
- Requires user approval before updating
- Shows colored diff (red for removed, green for added) before applying
- old_string must appear exactly once in the file

file_path.description: Path to file to update (relative or absolute)
